name: Boomer Brawler
short_description: A 2D fighting game where you play as old people! Compete to get your wish granted!!! 6 playable characters! 6 wishes to be granted! Simple button mashing controls!
detailed_description:
Once a year, a magical incubus known only as Fzzy Bzzy holds a dark tournament! The Prize? Anything the winner's heart desires! The cost? Absolutely nothing! Ha Ha! don't worry about it.

This year, Fzzy Bzzy is hosting a tournament for all the Baby Boomers of the world! Choose one of six playable old people and fight to get your wish granted! Will they wish for something selfless and for the betterment of humanity? Of course not, lol, they're all selfish!

Do you dare to compete in the Boomer Brawler Tournament?! Do you?! Do you dare?!!

A 2D fighter with 6 cutscenes if you win! 6 playable old people! Simple button mash controls!
